name: genpark-flash-sale-optimizer-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Optimize flash sale timing, discount depth, inventory allocation, and urgency messaging to maximize revenue during limited-time events.
author: genpark

products.description: Products to include: [{name, regular_price, cost, current_stock}].

sale_duration_hours.description: Duration of the flash sale in hours.

target_revenue_usd.description: Target revenue for the sale event.

sale_plan.description: Per-product sale config with discount, sale price, and inventory cap.

timing_recommendation.description: Best day/time to run the sale.
